inputs.text: Bachcha bahut bukhar se pareshan hai, sir dard bhi bahut hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms of fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache could be initial symptoms

inputs.text: Ab toh aankhon ke peeche dard bhi ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and joint pain are common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Aankhon ke peeche dard and bone pain could be indicative of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms, could be any viral infection

inputs.text: Bachche ka bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane bhi nazar aa rahe hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription from previous PHC visit shown

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, lal daane, and masoodon se khoon are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash and bleeding gums could be seen in other infections

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the presence of lal daane and masoodon se khoon

inputs.text: Bachcha abhi bhi bahut kamzor hai, harkat bhi nahin kar pa raha
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged weakness and inability to move are consistent with Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to presence of specific symptoms and signs

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to absence of typical symptoms
